page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Supplement Project Official Visual Library
text:
is a guidebook for the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Supplement Project by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 25 December 2003. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047071277 

Overview

The book contains the walkthrough for game completion, such as parameter fluctuations, item list, event occurrence conditions, ending conditions, etc. Both Ayanami and Asuka can be trained as desired. Also includes a newly exclusive manga.
